item.title: Cloud Security Alliance Added as CVE Numbering Authority (CNA)
item.description: Cloud Security Alliance Added as CVE Numbering Authority (CNA)newsApril 28, 2026Cloud Security Allianceis now aCVE Numbering Authority (CNA)for vulnerabilities in software developed and maintained by the Cloud Security Alliance (github.com/CloudSecurityAlliance/*).

item.title: OpenAI Added as CVE Numbering Authority (CNA)
item.description: OpenAI Added as CVE Numbering Authority (CNA)newsApril 28, 2026OpenAIis now aCVE Numbering Authority (CNA)for vulnerabilities in OpenAI installed software including desktop apps, mobile apps, and SDKs only.

item.title: Minutes from CVE Board Teleconference Meeting on March 18 Now Available
item.description: Minutes from CVE Board Teleconference Meeting on March 18 Now AvailablenewsMay 5, 2026TheCVE Boardheld a teleconference meeting on March 18, 2026. Read themeeting minutes summary.

item.title: Minutes from CVE Board Teleconference Meeting on April 1 Now Available
item.description: Minutes from CVE Board Teleconference Meeting on April 1 Now AvailablenewsMay 5, 2026TheCVE Boardheld a teleconference meeting on April 1, 2026. Read themeeting minutes summary.

item.title: Vulnerability Data Enrichment for CVE Records: 261 CNAs on the Enrichment Recognition List for May 4, 2026
item.description: Vulnerability Data Enrichment for CVE Records: 261 CNAs on the Enrichment Recognition List for May 4, 2026blogBy CVE Program|May 5, 2026

item.title: “Supplier ADP Pilot Update” — SADP Content Now Live in CVE Records
item.description: “Supplier ADP Pilot Update” — SADP Content Now Live in CVE RecordsblogBy CVE Program|May 5, 2026TheCVE™ Program’s “Supplier CVE Numbering Authority (CNA) as Authorized Data Publisher Pilot (SADP Pilot),” announced on March 24, 2026,officially launched on April 1, 2026.

item.title: Computer Incident Response Center Luxembourg (CIRCL) Added as CVE Numbering Authority (CNA)
item.description: Computer Incident Response Center Luxembourg (CIRCL) Added as CVE Numbering Authority (CNA)newsMay 5, 2026Computer Incident Response Center Luxembourg (CIRCL)is now aCVE Numbering Authority (CNA)for vulnerability assignment related to vulnerability coordination in Luxembourg, which may include reports on software, products, hardware, or services submitted to CIRCL in its role as the national authority for vulnerability coordination in Luxembourg and within the CSIRTs network.

item.title: Ygreky Added as CVE Numbering Authority (CNA)
item.description: Ygreky Added as CVE Numbering Authority (CNA)newsMay 5, 2026Ygreky SASUis now aCVE Numbering Authority (CNA)for all Ygreky products and infrastructure, and vulnerabilities discovered by, or reported to, Ygreky that are not covered by the scope of another CNA.

item.title: Orange Cyberdefense Added as CVE Numbering Authority (CNA)
item.description: Orange Cyberdefense Added as CVE Numbering Authority (CNA)newsMay 5, 2026Orange Cyberdefenseis now aCVE Numbering Authority (CNA)for Orange Cyberdefense branded products and technologies, unless embedded component or software covered by the scope of another CNA; as well as vulnerabilities in third-party software discovered by Orange Cyberdefense that are not in another CNA’s scope.

item.title: GVision Italia Added as CVE Numbering Authority (CNA)
item.description: GVision Italia Added as CVE Numbering Authority (CNA)newsMay 5, 2026GVision Italia S.r.l.is now aCVE Numbering Authority (CNA)for vulnerabilities affecting EU-certified and EU-hardened firmware, software components, and related services distributed and maintained by GVision Italia. This includes firmware variants modified, certified, and maintained by GVision Italia for the European market; associated software components, configuration tools, and update mechanisms under GVision Italia responsibility; and, public-facing services and portals operated by GVision Italia related to device management and security. This scope explicitly excludes products or firmware versions not modified or maintained by GVision Italia.
